fields.customfield_10103: Added a new CAN signal of HVbatHeatingStateIcon in Intelligent-E
fields.customfield_12359:
Add a new CAN signal of battery heater icon for 4WD vehicle.
The Navigation system shall receive "HVbatHeatingStateIcon" from CAN and transmit to HMI.
fields.customfield_13538: This ticket type "New request" is obsolete! Please change the ticket type above ↑
fields.customfield_12554:
24.12.16)
This EPIC is new requirement , Not carry over from IVI2.
If this EPIC is need to develop during PI25 , Firstly please make and confirm CRQ on CDC project.
fields.summary: [Navigation][Intelligent-E] Added a new CAN signal of HVbatHeatingStateIcon

comments.body:
Hello [~LGEJ-LGEJ109] -san, 

Please check the new requirement of Intelligent-E.

Dear, [~N206035] and [~TTC01198] 

(Cc. [~LGEJ-LGEJ109] )

Do we need to get started to develop it first and carry over it to A-IVI2?

Please take into account my question and let us know

Hello [~LGEJ-LGEJ97] -san,

This request is for CDC only. No need to carry it to CCS2.

Hello [~N206035] san , [~TTC01198] san  , [~N196317] san

CC [~LGEJ-LGEJ109] , [~LGEJ-LGEJ11] , [~LGEJ-LGEJ241] 

 

This EPIC is new requirement , Not carry over from IVI2.

If this EPIC is need to develop during PI25 , Firstly please make and confirm CRQ on CDC project.

 

Thank you.
January 2nd week is dead line of CRQ issue.

As per [~N206035] san CRQ is released.
[~LGEJ-LGEJ603] san will check LGE PM team

Mial title is"CDC_CRQ CDCL073, CDCL076, CDCL077, CDCL078" from Uramoto.

This is khanh.hoang's comment.
Hello [~N206035] -san,
I understand that the requirement only applies to 4WD vehicles.
This means that we will implement to make it work only for this type of vehicle.
But I do not know how to check it.
Could you please explain how to identify 4WD vehicles? 
Are there specific CAN signals or diagnostic resources for it?

Hello [~LGEJ-LGEJ109] -san,

EcoNav sends CAN signal to HMI, and HMI will distinguish 2WD and 4WD.

There is a new config of "CNF_HMI_BAT_TMP_Management" is added in CDC to define 2WD and 4WD.
[~LGEJ-LGEJ603] san team will crosscheck and make a plan based on wu -san answer
CRQ is not released. [~N194778] san will leave comment for this ticket direction

Hi, [~N196317] -san,
(cc: [~N206035] , [~LGEJ-LGEJ109] , [~EEL00792] , [~LGEJ-LGEJ603] )

We can't meet CRQ Order release during PI25.
Then Nissan move integration time from PI25 to PI26.
Cannot proceed in PI25. need to look back in PI26. moved to Backlog.
Reopen from Backlog for PI26 PIP.
